channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Audrey Lorberfeld
item.description: Audrey Lorberfeld A librarian-turned-software engineer working in search and information retrieval.

item.title: Search Communities
item.description: Search Communities The people networks of the search and information-retrieval world: identity-based communities, meetups, Slack groups, and open-source communities where practitioners connect, mentor, share knowledge, and hire.

item.title: Women of Search
item.description: Women of Search Women of Search (WoS) is an international community dedicated to empowering and celebrating women working in the search field.

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: Multilingual Search
item.description: Multilingual Search Serving search across multiple languages — or mixed-language queries — requires solutions at every layer of the stack: tokenization, retrieval, ranking, and evaluation.

item.title: Federated Search
item.description: Federated Search Querying multiple independent collections or search engines from a single entry point, then merging their results into one ranked list.

item.title: Box Embedding
item.description: Box Embedding A Region-Based Representation that represents an object as an axis-aligned hyper-rectangle (a “box”) in d-dimensional space, defined by a pair of opposite corners — a minimum corner z and a maximum corner Z.

item.title: Compositional Embeddings
item.description: Compositional Embeddings Embedding approaches in which the representation of a complex object is built by combining the representations of its parts under well-defined operations, rather than learned as an opaque whole.

item.title: Compositional Queries
item.description: Compositional Queries Queries that combine multiple attributes with logical operators — AND, OR, NOT — rather than asking about a single condition.
